body.title: Move db_proxy to utility closet as rack shelf module
body.result: db_proxy.py moved to lab/utility_closet/. Re-export shim at old path. DatabaseShelf rack module with health/metrics. 883 lines out of Igor.
body.description:
Migrate db_proxy from Igor internals to a UC rack module. DB queries stay direct-call (no comms:// overhead for high-frequency reads), but all queries log audit trail to comms://log/db-proxy.

## Principle
- Conversations (back and forth, human-readable, history matters) → route through comms://
- Service calls (low-latency, high-frequency, internal) → direct call, log audit trail to comms channel
- comms is the observer, not the transport for everything

## Scope
- Move db_proxy to lab/utility_closet/db_proxy.py (or db_shelf/)
- Register as UC rack module (health endpoint, standard interface)
- Add comms://log/db-proxy channel for query audit logging
- Igor imports from UC shelf instead of internal module
- Redis/Valkey cache same pattern: direct API, log to comms://log/cache

## Does NOT change
- Query API (db_proxy interface stays the same)
- ?→%s translation, connection pooling, all existing behavior
- Igor code that calls db_proxy (just import path changes)

## Depends on
- T-uc-comms-module (for audit logging channel)
- T-uc-rack-architecture (module interface)
